race.comment: MR TICKLES (2) showed early speed from a good draw last time and proved too slick, winning by 1.75 lengths at Cranbourne. Backs up quickly from Thursday and can repeat the dose from a nice draw. BLONDIE'S AWARD (8) is racing fairly well this time in, solid in Adelaide last time out. The placing at Caulfield three back reads very well for this, she can roll forward and give a huge sight. LAKE GILLEAR (7) faded late last time over this route on heavy 10 ground but was racing well enough prior and has been given a let-up for this. Can improve. MY BONNIE LASSIE (10) broke through for a smart maiden win on tough going at Wangaratta when last seen and profiles as a filly who can go on with the job now in another winnable race.
